Title: Bandit
Writer: Kraig Wenman, Robert Knuckle, Ed Arnold
Actors: Josh Duhamel, Elisha Cuthbert, Nestor Carbonell
Plot: After escaping a Michigan prison, a charming career criminal assumes a new identity in Canada and goes on to rob a record 59 banks and jewellery stores while being hunted by a police task force. Based on the story of The Flying Ba...
